examples: The Afghans I met were neither xenophobic nor bellicose.
And Mr Giuliani is far more bellicose than any other candidate.
Mark N. Brown, 49, an artist painting nearby, was less bellicose.
White House spokesman Jay Carney said the US was "certainly concerned by North Korea's bellicose rhetoric".
But if cool heads prevail, peacemaking metaphors could yet become as pervasive as today's bellicose ones.
